edu.bu.pas.risk.territory

Description
edu.bu.pas.risk

edu.bu.pas.risk.util
 
  • Classes in edu.bu.pas.risk.territory used by edu.bu.pas.risk
    Class
    Description
    Board
    The immutable map you are playing on, with no game state information.
    Continent
    A continent is an immutable grouping of territories. e.g.
    Territory
    1 single immutable territory or country that can be captured.
    TerritoryCard
    Whenever an agent conquers a territory, and they have not already been rewarded a card this turn, then they receive a territory card which can be redeemed for free armies.

    1 single immutable territory or country that can be captured.
    TerritoryCard
    Whenever an agent conquers a territory, and they have not already been rewarded a card this turn, then they receive a territory card which can be redeemed for free armies.
